column1: What does a data analyst do?
column2:
答案: A data analyst uses data to answer business questions. They collect, clean, and analyze data, then present findings to stakeholders. They act as a bridge between raw data and business decisions.
关键技能: SQL, Excel, data visualization, communication

答案: The Medalis architecture organizes data into three layers:
• Bronze Layer: Raw, unprocessed data
• Silver Layer: Cleaned and structured data
• Gold Layer: Optimized data ready for analysis
目的: To organize data by level of processing for efficient management

column1: Why is automation important in data pipelines?
column2:
答案: Automation is crucial because:
• It saves time by eliminating manual work
• It reduces errors in data processing
• It ensures consistent data flow
• It allows systems to scale without adding staff
• It enables faster decision-making

column1: How do data scientists differ from data analysts?
column2:
答案: The key difference is their focus:
• Data Analysts: Analyze historical data to answer current questions
• Data Scientists: Build predictive models to answer future questions
共同点: Both use data to drive business decisions

column1: What is the famous quote about data and opinions?
column2:
引用: \Without data you're just another person with an opinion.\" — William Deming
含义: This emphasizes that decisions based on facts and evidence (data) are more reliable than those based on personal opinions, which can be biased or incorrect.
重要性: It's the core philosophy of data-driven decision making"

column1: What is the role of ML engineers?
column2:
答案: ML engineers are responsible for:
• Deploying models into production environments
• Ensuring models are secure, scalable, and available 24/7
• Integrating model results into applications and dashboards
• Making predictive insights accessible across the company

column1: Why do companies need predictive analytics?
column2:
答案: Predictive analytics helps companies:
• Anticipate future trends and changes
• Prepare for challenges before they occur
• Identify new opportunities
• Stay ahead of competition
• Make proactive rather than reactive decisions

column1: What challenges arise from manual data extraction?
column2:
答案: Manual extraction creates several problems:
• Time-consuming — requests take hours or days
• Error-prone — humans make mistakes
• Doesn't scale — can't handle big data
• System failures — manual processes may crash
• Resource waste — analysts spend time on routine tasks

角色: Data Analyst
职责: Answer business questions using data
工作流程:
1. Collect data from sources
2. Clean and structure data
3. Analyze for insights
4. Create visualizations
5. Present findings
核心技能: SQL, Excel, Power BI/Tableau, Communication

角色: Data Architect
职责: Design scalable data system architecture
工作内容:
• Design blueprint like a building architect
• Organize data into layers
• Ensure system scalability
关键成果: Medalis architecture with Bronze/Silver/Gold layers

角色: Data Engineer
职责: Build data pipelines and automation
工作内容:
• Connect to multiple source systems
• Build automated pipelines
• Ensure fast data flow
• Support real-time processing
核心成果: Automated data flow from sources to users

角色: BI Developer
职责: Automate reports and create dashboards
工作内容:
• Build server environments
• Create interactive dashboards
• Manage access control
• Ensure 24/7 availability
核心成果: Self-service analytics for stakeholders

角色: Data Scientist
职责: Build predictive models for future insights
工作内容:
• Analyze historical patterns
• Build and train models
• Run experiments
• Make predictions
核心价值: Enable proactive, forward-looking decisions

角色: ML Engineer
职责: Deploy ML models to production
工作内容:
• Prepare deployment environments
• Deploy models to production
• Ensure security and scalability
• Integrate with applications
核心价值: Make predictions accessible company-wide
